intentSynonyms: make a new cart in dominos
open a new cart in dominos
start a new carryout order at a store in dominos
description: Create a new shopping cart at a specific store for carryout. Sets up the browser so the Domino's website recognizes the cart. Call this before add_product_to_cart if no store has been selected yet.

store_id.description: Store ID (e.g., "8290"). Use find_stores_by_address to find stores.
